parameters.text:
=You are a Pregnancy Clinical Assistant AI.

The patient details input JSON is:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.patient_data ?? $json) }}

The following medical knowledge excerpts were retrieved from trusted obstetric literature (ACOG guidelines, peer-reviewed journals, and clinical obstetrics references):

MEDICAL KNOWLEDGE CONTEXT:
{{ ($json.retrieved_chunks ?? []).join("\n\n") }}

You MUST use this medical knowledge only as supporting clinical guidance when interpreting the patient data.

You will analyze BOTH conditions:

1. Preeclampsia risk (emergency triage)
2. Macrosomia risk (GDM coaching + prevention)

========================================
CRITICAL INPUT RULES (NO HALLUCINATION)
=======================================

1. You MUST use ONLY:
   • the input patient JSON
   • the retrieved medical knowledge context

2. DO NOT invent, assume, guess, or modify any numbers:

   * BP
   * glucose values
   * HbA1c
   * proteinuria
   * symptoms
   * gestational age
   * BMI
   * model risk scores

3. The output patient_id MUST exactly equal the input patient_id.

4. If any field is missing/null, mention it as "missing" in the assessment text.

5. proteinuria_dipstick is numeric scale 0–3 (NO + sign).

6. NEVER add new patient name, gender, or identity information.

7. If the medical knowledge context conflicts with the patient data, ALWAYS prioritize the patient data.

8. Output MUST be strictly valid JSON (no markdown, no ```json fences).

========================================
OUTPUT MUST PRESERVE FULL INPUT JSON
====================================

VERY IMPORTANT:

Your output MUST include ALL original input fields exactly as received.

DO NOT drop any input keys.
DO NOT rename any input keys.
DO NOT change the values of input keys.

You are allowed to ADD new analysis fields on top of the existing fields.

So the output JSON MUST contain:

• all keys from the patient input (complete vitals + model scores)
PLUS
• the AI-generated clinical analysis keys listed below.

========================================
DECISION LOGIC (MUST FOLLOW TIERS)
==================================

You MUST follow the ML risk tiers from the input.

If preeclampsia_risk_tier == "high":

recommended_action = "EMERGENCY"
send_alert = true
alert_target = "hospital"

Else if preeclampsia_risk_tier == "medium":

recommended_action = "ALERT_DOCTOR"
send_alert = true
alert_target = "doctor"

Else if macrosomia_risk_tier == "high":

recommended_action = "COACH_PATIENT"
send_alert = false
alert_target = "none"

Else:

recommended_action = "LOG_ONLY"
send_alert = false
alert_target = "none"

========================================
CLINICAL REASONING GUIDELINES
=============================

Use the medical knowledge context when explaining your reasoning.

For example you may reference:

• Hypertension ≥140/90 mmHg in pregnancy
• Severe hypertension ≥160/110 mmHg
• Proteinuria thresholds for preeclampsia
• Glucose targets in pregnancy
• Lifestyle interventions for GDM

Only reference information that appears in the retrieved_chunks context.

Do NOT introduce new clinical rules not present in the provided context.

========================================
RESPONSE QUALITY REQUIREMENTS
=============================

• Do NOT diagnose diseases.
• Provide risk-based clinical guidance only.
• Be clear, professional, and clinically safe.
• Keep the summary short but meaningful.
• Preeclampsia is always higher urgency than macrosomia.

Doctor message must include:
• risk tiers
• key vitals (from input only)
• relevant symptoms
• gestational age

Patient message must be:
• calm
• supportive
• actionable

========================================
STRICT OUTPUT FORMAT (MERGED JSON)
==================================

Return ONLY ONE valid JSON object.

FIRST include ALL INPUT fields exactly as received.

THEN include these additional keys (exact same names):

{
...ALL_INPUT_FIELDS_HERE,

"summary": "...",
"preeclampsia_assessment": "...",
"macrosomia_assessment": "...",

"recommended_action": "LOG_ONLY | COACH_PATIENT | ALERT_DOCTOR | EMERGENCY",

"send_alert": true/false,
"alert_target": "none | caretaker | doctor | hospital",

"patient_message": "...",
"doctor_message": "...",

"next_monitoring_time": "...",

"confidence": 0.0-1.0
}

FINAL OUTPUT RULES

• DO NOT wrap the JSON with markdown.
• DO NOT output an array.
• DO NOT output explanations.
• DO NOT create nested objects like "agent_output".

Return the final JSON object only.


The system validates your output using clinical safety guardrails.
If validation fails, your output may be regenerated.

Therefore ensure:
• strict JSON format
• all required fields
• correct recommended_action
• consistent reasoning with risk tiers.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  input1.*,
  input2.preeclampsia_risk_score,
  input2.preeclampsia_risk_tier,
  input2.macrosomia_risk_score,
  input2.macrosomia_risk_tier,
  input2.model_loaded
FROM input1
LEFT JOIN input2
ON input1.patient_id = input2.patient_id
AND input1.timestamp = input2.timestamp

parameters.jsCode:
// ✅ Single Test Case Generator (One run = One patient payload)
// Change TEST_CASE value to switch test case.

const TEST_CASE = "MED_MED"; 
// Options:
// "LOW_LOW"
// "MED_MED"
// "HIGH_HIGH"
// "HIGH_PE_LOW_MAC"
// "LOW_PE_HIGH_MAC"
// "MED_PE_HIGH_MAC"
// "HIGH_PE_MED_MAC"
// "MED_PE_LOW_MAC"

const now = new Date().toISOString();

const cases = {
  LOW_LOW: {
    patient_id: "TEST_LOW_LOW",
    timestamp: now,
    gestational_age_weeks: 28,
    maternal_age: 26,
    pre_pregnancy_bmi: 22.5,
    gdm_diagnosed: 0,

    systolic_bp: 118,
    diastolic_bp: 76,
    proteinuria_dipstick: 0,
    severe_headache: 0,
    vision_changes: 0,
    upper_abdominal_pain: 0,
    swelling_face_hands: 0,

    fasting_glucose: 86,
    postprandial_1hr_glucose: 124,
    post_meal_walk_minutes: 20,
    sleep_hours: 7.5,

    weight_kg: 64,
    hba1c: 5.3,
    food_log_text: "Chapati + dal + vegetables"
  },

  MED_MED: {
  patient_id: "TEST_MED_MED",
  timestamp: now,
  gestational_age_weeks: 32,
  maternal_age: 38,
  pre_pregnancy_bmi: 42.4,
  gdm_diagnosed: 0,

  systolic_bp: 142,
  diastolic_bp: 79,
  severe_headache: 0,
  vision_changes: 0,
  upper_abdominal_pain: 0,
  swelling_face_hands: 0,
  proteinuria_dipstick: 1,

  fasting_glucose: 99,
  postprandial_1hr_glucose: 126,
  food_log_text: "paneer salad",

  post_meal_walk_minutes: 29,
  sleep_hours: 6.1,

  weight_kg: 113.7,
  hba1c: 5.6
},


  HIGH_HIGH: {
    patient_id: "TEST_HIGH_HIGH",
    timestamp: now,
    gestational_age_weeks: 34,
    maternal_age: 33,
    pre_pregnancy_bmi: 34.0,

    systolic_bp: 165,
    diastolic_bp: 112,
    proteinuria_dipstick: 3,
    severe_headache: 1,
    vision_changes: 1,
    upper_abdominal_pain: 1,
    swelling_face_hands: 1,

    fasting_glucose: 118,
    postprandial_1hr_glucose: 195,
    post_meal_walk_minutes: 0,
    sleep_hours: 4.8,

    weight_kg: 92,
    hba1c: 6.6,
    food_log_text: "Had a bagel, orange juice, and dessert"
  },

  HIGH_PE_LOW_MAC: {
    patient_id: "TEST_HIGH_PE_LOW_MAC",
    timestamp: now,
    gestational_age_weeks: 36,
    maternal_age: 28,
    pre_pregnancy_bmi: 25.0,
    gdm_diagnosed: 0,

    systolic_bp: 162,
    diastolic_bp: 110,
    proteinuria_dipstick: 2,
    severe_headache: 1,
    vision_changes: 1,
    upper_abdominal_pain: 0,
    swelling_face_hands: 1,

    fasting_glucose: 88,
    postprandial_1hr_glucose: 130,
    post_meal_walk_minutes: 15,
    sleep_hours: 7.2,

    weight_kg: 74,
    hba1c: 5.4,
    food_log_text: "Ate salad + grilled chicken"
  },

  LOW_PE_HIGH_MAC: {
    patient_id: "TEST_LOW_PE_HIGH_MAC",
    timestamp: now,
    gestational_age_weeks: 30,
    maternal_age: 27,
    pre_pregnancy_bmi: 33.0,
    gdm_diagnosed: 1,

    systolic_bp: 122,
    diastolic_bp: 78,
    proteinuria_dipstick: 0,
    severe_headache: 0,
    vision_changes: 0,
    upper_abdominal_pain: 0,

    sleep_hours: 5.4,

    weight_kg: 88,
    hba1c: 6.5,
    food_log_text: "Had pasta and dessert"
  },

  MED_PE_HIGH_MAC: {
    patient_id: "TEST_MED_PE_HIGH_MAC",
    timestamp: now,
    gestational_age_weeks: 33,
    maternal_age: 31,
    pre_pregnancy_bmi: 31.0,
    gdm_diagnosed: 1,

    systolic_bp: 150,
    diastolic_bp: 98,
    proteinuria_dipstick: 1,
    severe_headache: 0,
    vision_changes: 0,
    upper_abdominal_pain: 0,
    swelling_face_hands: 1,

    fasting_glucose: 108,
    postprandial_1hr_glucose: 182,
    post_meal_walk_minutes: 5,
    sleep_hours: 5.8,

    weight_kg: 86,
    hba1c: 6.3,
    food_log_text: "Had bagel and juice"
  },

  HIGH_PE_MED_MAC: {
    patient_id: "TEST_HIGH_PE_MED_MAC",
    timestamp: now,
    gestational_age_weeks: 35,
    maternal_age: 34,
    pre_pregnancy_bmi: 29.0,
    gdm_diagnosed: 1,

    systolic_bp: 160,
    diastolic_bp: 110,
    proteinuria_dipstick: 2,
    severe_headache: 1,
    vision_changes: 0,
    upper_abdominal_pain: 1,
    swelling_face_hands: 1,

    fasting_glucose: 98,
    postprandial_1hr_glucose: 160,
    post_meal_walk_minutes: 10,
    sleep_hours: 6.0,

    weight_kg: 84,
    hba1c: 6.0,
    food_log_text: "Rice and curry"
  },

  MED_PE_LOW_MAC: {
    patient_id: "TEST_MED_PE_LOW_MAC",
    timestamp: now,
    gestational_age_weeks: 31,
    maternal_age: 29,
    pre_pregnancy_bmi: 26.5,
    gdm_diagnosed: 0,

    systolic_bp: 142,
    diastolic_bp: 92,
    proteinuria_dipstick: 1,
    severe_headache: 0,
    vision_changes: 0,
    upper_abdominal_pain: 0,
    swelling_face_hands: 1,

    fasting_glucose: 89,
    postprandial_1hr_glucose: 132,
    post_meal_walk_minutes: 20,
    sleep_hours: 7.0,

    weight_kg: 72,
    hba1c: 5.5,
    food_log_text: "Ate dal + vegetables"
  }
};

if (!cases[TEST_CASE]) {
  throw new Error("Invalid TEST_CASE. Please select a valid option.");
}

return { json: cases[TEST_CASE] };

parameters.query:
SELECT
  input1.*,
  input2.*
FROM input1
LEFT JOIN input2
ON input1.patient_id = input2.patient_id
AND input1.timestamp = input2.timestamp
LIMIT 1

parameters.text:
=You are “Pregnancy Self-Care & Nutrition Coach AI”.
Your job is to generate patient-friendly educational content for a PDF report.

INPUT_JSON:
{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}

You will receive one object called INPUT_JSON which contains:
- patient vitals and symptoms
- lab values (if available)
- food_log_text
- model risk scores and tiers for:
  (1) preeclampsia risk
  (2) macrosomia risk

CRITICAL RULES (MUST FOLLOW):
1) Use ONLY the values inside INPUT_JSON. Do NOT invent names, weeks, numbers, or symptoms.
2) Do NOT diagnose. This is a risk-support education summary only.
3) Do NOT give medication advice.
4) Include safety warning signs (red flags) especially for preeclampsia.
5) Create a personalized meal plan and daily routine based on:
   - macrosomia_risk_tier
   - glucose values
   - food_log_text
   - post_meal_walk_minutes
   - sleep_hours
6) Provide realistic, safe lifestyle advice suitable for pregnancy.
7) Output MUST be valid JSON only. No markdown. No code fences.

OUTPUT JSON STRUCTURE (return exactly this):

{
  "patient_id": "...",
  "report_title": "Personalized Pregnancy Self-Care Plan",
  "risk_summary_simple": {
    "preeclampsia_tier": "...",
    "preeclampsia_score": 0.0,
    "macrosomia_tier": "...",
    "macrosomia_score": 0.0,
    "one_line_summary": "..."
  },
  "today_focus": [
    "..."
  ],
  "diet_plan": {
    "goal": "...",
    "breakfast_options": ["...", "...", "..."],
    "lunch_options": ["...", "...", "..."],
    "dinner_options": ["...", "...", "..."],
    "snack_options": ["...", "..."],
    "avoid_or_limit": ["...", "...", "..."],
    "hydration_tip": "..."
  },
  "activity_plan": {
    "recommended_walk_minutes": "...",
    "post_meal_walk_tip": "...",
    "safe_activity_note": "..."
  },
  "sleep_plan": {
    "sleep_target_hours": "7-9",
    "sleep_tip": "..."
  },
  "blood_pressure_safety": {
    "monitoring_tip": "...",
    "red_flags": ["...", "...", "...", "..."],
    "what_to_do_if_red_flags": "..."
  },
  "glucose_safety": {
    "monitoring_tip": "...",
    "food_log_comment": "...",
    "simple_swap_suggestions": ["...", "..."]
  },
  "daily_checklist": [
    "..."
  ],
  "next_steps": [
    "..."
  ],
  "chatbot_link_label": "Need more help? Use your AI Assistant link:",
  "chatbot_link": ""
}

IMPORTANT:
- chatbot_link MUST be left as empty string "" (workflow will fill it later).
- Keep advice short, simple, supportive, and pregnancy-safe.

parameters.subject: =Your Pregnancy Risk Summary + Self-Care Tips ✅
parameters.message:
=

Pregnancy AI Assistant ✅

Daily Risk Summary + Self-Care Guidance

Hello 👋
Here is your latest pregnancy health update:

Patient ID: {{$json.patient_id}}

🩺 Preeclampsia Risk
Tier: {{ $json.risk_summary_simple.preeclampsia_tier }}
Score: {{ $json.risk_summary_simple.preeclampsia_score }}
👶 Macrosomia Risk
Tier: {{ $json.risk_summary_simple.macrosomia_tier }}
Score: {{ $json.risk_summary_simple.macrosomia_score }}

🌿 Self-Care Points for Today

  1. Monitor BP & symptoms
    If you notice severe headache, vision changes, upper abdominal pain, or sudden swelling → contact your doctor immediately.
  2. Healthy meals
    Prefer balanced meals (protein + fiber + vegetables). Reduce sweets, sugary drinks, and refined carbs.
  3. Light activity
    Try a 10–20 minute walk after meals (if your doctor allows).
  4. Hydration
    Drink water regularly through the day.
  5. Sleep
    Aim for 7–9 hours of sleep. Take short rest breaks if needed.
  6. Consistency
    Follow your doctor’s schedule for checkups & lab tests.

💬 Your Personalized Chatbot Link

Open your Pregnancy AI Assistant anytime for more guidance:

Open My Chatbot ✅
You can use this chatbot to:
  • Check your risk summary
  • Ask questions about food / sugar / BP
  • Get safe self-care coaching

Take care ❤️
Pregnancy Care AI System

⚠️ Note: This is a risk-support tool and does not replace medical advice.

parameters.subject: =[Pregnancy AI Alert] Patient {{ $json.patient_id }} — PE: {{ $json.agent_output.preeclampsia_risk_tier }} | MAC: {{ $json.agent_output.macrosomia_risk_tier }}
parameters.message:
=
🩺 Pregnancy AI Alert — Clinical Risk Report
Patient ID: {{ $json.patient_id }} | Timestamp: {{ $json.meta?.timestamp || $json.timestamp }}
⚠️ Recommended Action: {{ $json.action_type }}

System Summary: {{ $json.summary || $json.agent_output?.summary }}

🩺 Preeclampsia Risk
Tier: {{ $json.agent_output?.preeclampsia_risk_tier || $json.preeclampsia_risk_tier }}
Score: {{ $json.agent_output?.preeclampsia_risk_score || $json.preeclampsia_risk_score }}

{{ $json.agent_output?.preeclampsia_assessment || $json.preeclampsia_assessment }}

👶 Macrosomia Risk
Tier: {{ $json.agent_output?.macrosomia_risk_tier || $json.macrosomia_risk_tier }}
Score: {{ $json.agent_output?.macrosomia_risk_score || $json.macrosomia_risk_score }}

{{ $json.agent_output.macrosomia_assessment }}

📋 Patient Inputs (Recent)
ParameterValue
Blood Pressure{{ $json.agent_output.systolic_bp }}/{{ $json.agent_output.diastolic_bp }} mmHg
Glucose (1hr PP){{ $json.agent_output.postprandial_1hr_glucose }} mg/dL
👩‍⚕️ Doctor Actions (1-click Feedback)
✅ Acknowledge Risk ❌ False Alert 📝 Detailed Feedback

Clicking these buttons automatically logs the clinical outcome to the re-training dataset for Patient {{$json.patient_id}}.

⚠️ Note: This is an AI-generated decision-support alert. Clinical judgement must be followed.

parameters.subject: =🚨 EMERGENCY — {{$json.patient_id}} |  {{ $json.preeclampsia_risk_tier === "high" && $json.macrosomia_risk_tier === "high"   ? "HIGH PE + HIGH MAC"   : ($json.preeclampsia_risk_tier === "high"       ? "HIGH PREECLAMPSIA RISK"       : ($json.macrosomia_risk_tier === "high"           ? "HIGH MACROSOMIA RISK"           : "URGENT REVIEW")) }} | BP {{$json.systolic_bp}}/{{$json.diastolic_bp}} | GA {{$json.gestational_age_weeks}}w

Patient ID: {{$json.patient_id}}   |   Timestamp: {{$json.timestamp || $json.meta?.timestamp}}

⚠️ EMERGENCY

Glucose Fasting={{ $json.agent_output?.fasting_glucose || $json.fasting_glucose }} mg/dL

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM input1
CROSS JOIN input2
